feedItems.description: allocated £6.7m to Environment & Streets (≈£53 per resident)
allocated £2.6m to Planning & Development (≈£20 per resident)
allocated £3.2m to Council Running Costs (≈£25 per resident)
allocated £2.3m to Culture & Leisure (≈£18 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £115 (4.8%) to £2532
